name: kypo-aws-lib
documentation:
# kypo-aws-lib

Python library that serves as AWS driver for the sandbox-service (the Django microservice).
It is meant to be an installable component, not stand-alone library.

It implements the
[KypoCloudClientBase](https://gitlab.ics.muni.cz/muni-kypo-crp/backend-python/kypo-python-commons/-/blob/master/kypo/cloud_commons/cloud_client_base.py?ref_type=heads)
interface. The interface allows seemless integration to the KYPO CRP environment.

## Communication with AWS API
The library utilizes Boto3 library for communication with AWS API. Boto3 implements multiple clients,
each serving its own AWS Service.

## Contents
This library contains:
 * **kypo/aws_driver** -- the implementation of the library
 * **pyproject.toml** -- metadata of the library

## Releasing a new version
The release of a new version consists of two steps:
 1. Update the version of package in the pyproject.toml file. Note that upload of the package will fail
 if the registry already contains the package with given name and version.
 2. Create a suitable commit that must include `[release]` in the commit message. For example:

 ```text
feat: implement my new special feature

<body of the commit> ... and updating version in pyproject.toml
[release]
```

documentation:
---
param availability_zone: AWS availability zone
param aws_access_key: AWS access key
param aws_secret_key: AWS secret key
param base_subnet_name: The Name of base subnet
param base_vpc_name: The Name of base VPC
param ca_bundle: Path to CA bundle file
param region: AWS region
param trc: TransformationConfiguration
---

documentation: Counter incomatibility of AWS and OpenStack terraform resources

methods.name: kypo.aws_driver.aws_client.KypoAwsClient.get_terraform_provider
documentation: Provider is included in the terraform template (created by cdktf).

methods.name: kypo.aws_driver.aws_client.KypoAwsClient.create_terraform_template
documentation:
Create terraform template that will be deployed.

```
param topology_instance

TopologyInstance used to create template

keyword key_pair_name_ssh

The name of SSH key pair in the cloud

keyword key_pair_name_cert

The name of certificate key pair in the cloud

keyword resource_prefix

The prefix of all resources

return

Terraform template as a string
```

methods.name: kypo.aws_driver.aws_client.KypoAwsClient.list_images
documentation:
List all available images on the cloud project.

```
return

List of Image objects.
```

methods.name: kypo.aws_driver.aws_client.KypoAwsClient.get_image
documentation:
Get Image object based on its ID.

```
param image_id

The ID of image on the cloud

return

Image object
```

methods.name: kypo.aws_driver.aws_client.KypoAwsClient.resume_node
documentation:
Resumes a suspended node.
In AWS environment, resume and start are equivalent.

```
param node_id

ID of an instance.
```

```

```


methods.name: kypo.aws_driver.aws_client.KypoAwsClient.get_console_url
documentation: AWS does not support any URL-based connection to running instances.

methods.name: kypo.aws_driver.aws_client.KypoAwsClient.create_keypair
documentation:
Create key pair in cloud.

```
param name

Name of the key pair

param public_key

SSH public key or certificate, it None new is created

param key_type

IGNORED -- AWS will detect correct format

return

None
```

methods.name: kypo.aws_driver.aws_client.KypoAwsClient.get_keypair
documentation:
Get KeyPair instance from cloud.

```
param name

The name of key pair

return

Key pair information

raise KeyPairDoesNotExist

Key pair does not exist
```

methods.name: kypo.aws_driver.aws_client.KypoAwsClient.delete_keypair
documentation:
Delete key pair.

```
param name

The name of key pair

return

None
```

methods.name: kypo.aws_driver.aws_client.KypoAwsClient.get_quota_set
documentation:
Get quota set of cloud project.
Note, AWS does not keep track of 'subnet', 'ram', 'instances'. The main problem
is getting limits.

```
return

QuotaSet object
```

methods.name: kypo.aws_driver.aws_client.KypoAwsClient.get_project_name
documentation: Get project name. In AWS environment, the project refers to the AWS account.

methods.name: kypo.aws_driver.aws_client.KypoAwsClient.get_hardware_usage
documentation:
Get hardware usage of a single sandbox.

```
param topology_instance

Topology instance from which the sandbox is created

return

HardwareUsage object
```

methods.name: kypo.aws_driver.aws_client.KypoAwsClient.get_flavors_dict
documentation:
Gets flavors defined in OpenStack project with their vcpu and ram usage as dictionary
Boto3 does not support 'no-paggination' parameter yet.
Hence, to get all flavors, we need paginator (iterator over pages).

methods.name: kypo.aws_driver.aws_client.KypoAwsClient.get_project_limits
documentation:
Get resources limits of cloud project.
AWS does not specify limits for all attributes. For such attributes it is suitable
to specify arbitrary max value as it is used to compute how many sandboxes
can be build.
\:return: Limits object

methods.name: kypo.aws_driver.aws_client.KypoAwsClient.get_node_details
documentation:
Get node details from Terraform attributes.

```
param terraform_attrs

Terraform node attributes

return

NodeDetails instance
```
AWS client for KYPO.
